violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Cloth used with sani spray stated as changed out weekly.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. -Both sanitizer solutions found with +200ppm Chlorine solution. *Sani sink should be maintained at 50ppm Chlorine, sani Spray should be maintained at 100ppm Chlorine.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Interior surfaces of table top oven has build up of residue.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
